since_last: 61% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.42%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.92% · BTC -3.64% · Gold -1.99% · Nasdaq100 +2.12%. 61% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.42%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.42%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.92%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +11.85%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +11.85%, SMR +10.93%, INTC +8.94%, CEVA +8.66%, TLN +8.61%. Laggards: INOD -8.87%, SPCX -6.26%, IBM -5.66%, MDB -4.54%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.26% at $179.82
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.26% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
